description: Government receipt attesting to payment of the government tax on the sale of an enslaved woman. Seller: Sitt al-Ahl bt. Yaʿqūb al-Yahūdī. Buyer: Sumra bt. Bū Saʿīd al-Yahūdī. Salve: Tawfīq. The broker was Umm Sitt al-Ahl al-Dallāla (likely the seller's mother). Date: 21 Rabīʿ II 522 AH = 24 April 1128 CE. The payment was 2/3 dinar. On verso there is a filing note that seems to read "khaṭṭ al-sharīf bi-wājib Tawfīq."
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
